title: discaria exilis
intro: Discaria exilis, also known as the prickly button bush, is a shrub-like plant native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Discaria exilis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
